meaning: 士麦那(土耳其西部港市伊兹密尔
examples: There was a Young Person of Smyrna.
Yoel named the birds hopping about: grackle, raven, blackstart, Smyrna kingfisher.
To help sell more, Nissan is building big new facilities in Smyrna, Tennessee, and Canton, Mississippi.
Nissan's Mississippi plant involves layers of complexity even beyond those in the Smyrna factory.
